4ef430dd.name: llamacppqwen35a3bone
4ef430dd.description: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One
4ef430dd.title: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (Olares One)
4ef430dd.fullDescription:
Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (MoE, 3B active) served via llama.cpp — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
Unsloth Dynamic Q4_K_XL quantization (important layers upcasted to 8/16-bit).
MoE experts offloaded to CPU RAM, attention on GPU.
Flash attention, CUDA graph optimization, and op-offload enabled.
llama.cpp b8234 with GATED_DELTA_NET fused op for Qwen MoE.
Downloads the GGUF model on first launch (~22GB) and caches it.
Exposes an OpenAI-compatible API on port 8080.

49c5b493.name: qwen3ttstone
49c5b493.description: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B — text-to-speech with voice cloning, optimized for Olares One
49c5b493.title: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B (Olares One)
49c5b493.fullDescription:
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice served via Gradio — optimized for Olares One.
RTX 5090M (24GB) + 96GB DDR5 + Core Ultra 9 275HX.
9 built-in premium voices with instruction control.
Zero-shot voice cloning from 3 seconds of reference audio.
10 languages: French, English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, Russian, Portuguese, Spanish, Italian.
Downloads the model on first launch (~4.5GB) and caches it.
Exposes a Gradio web UI on port 8000.
